positioning.shortLine: Roftrix Roofing presents as a capable roofing business with a clear quote path.
positioning.proofBoundary: Use demo-safe claims only. Do not invent licences, awards, reviews, years in business, exact prices, or real addresses.

logo.reason: If the client has no logo, choose one sensible demo mark automatically. Do not ask the client to pick and do not generate multiple paid options.

options.direction: Classic Premium Roftix style: simple geometric roof/service mark plus readable wordmark. No fake badges, no copied reference logo.
options.svgConcept: <svg viewBox="0 0 180 48" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="img"><path d="M8 27 30 9l22 18" fill="none" stroke="#FF6F3C" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M20 27h24v14H20z" fill="#004D40"/><text x="66" y="32" font-family="Inter, Arial, sans-serif" font-size="24" font-weight="800" fill="#212121">RR</text></svg>

typography.display: Serif, Bold, Uppercase or Title Case for headings to evoke premium and classic tone
typography.body: Sans-serif, Regular weight for readability in paragraphs

imageDirection.hero: High-quality architectural photos of modern roofed homes with warm sunlight
imageDirection.services: Minimalist line icons paired with subtle photo overlays representing roof tasks
imageDirection.projects: Photographic case studies showing diverse roofing styles in real environments
mustAvoid: Overly staged or generic stock images with too much unrelated props
Images with excessive filters or low contrast
Photos featuring people facing camera or unrelated lifestyle shots
